commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=f538929c97acb5997256344f54c6e1ae6b05823c)
commands.review_summary:
The PR calls `getMyCommands()` before using the cached Telegram command hash to skip command-menu synchronization.

PR surface: Source +14. Total +14 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. from source for the same-process stale-cache case: after a successful sync writes the process-local hash, a later cached-hash call currently returns before checking remote Telegram state. The linked stale-file/restart report is already fixed on main, so this PR is about a narrower residual failure mode.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The code repair is narrow, but the external PR still needs contributor-supplied real Telegram proof, so this should stay in human review rather than an automated repair lane.

target.title: #92944: Telegram commands can remain empty after interrupted sync due to stale local command hash
target.author: zhiqiang26

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
